top_signals.title: Kenya, Congo Eurobonds Among Top Winners From Iran War Trade Unwind
top_signals.summary: Kenya and Democratic Republic of Congo are among the top performing African debt markets this month, as tumbling crude prices lure investors back to securities issued by oil importers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Russia used social engineering to breach prominent messaging accounts, Ukraine says
top_signals.summary: Ukraine's SBU described a long-running Russian operation that used fake tech-support workers to persuade people to hand over credentials to their messaging apps.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Fed Will Stay Patient, Says Michael Darda
top_signals.summary: Michael Darda, Roth Capital chief economist and macro strategist, joins to talk about Federal Reserve monetary policy and says the agency will remain "patient." He also talks about a potential ruling from the Supreme Court about Lisa Cook. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The Defense Industrial Alliance Washington Is Throwing Away
top_signals.summary:
As the relationship between the United States and Canada continues to degrade, it now comes at the expense of each country’s industrial security.Last month, the Pentagon announced the unilateral suspension of the 86-year-old Canadian Permanent Joint Board on Defense in response to what the White House sees as Ottawa’s failure to present a credible plan to spend 3.5 percent of GDP on defense by 2035. And the opening of the gleaming new bridge between Detroit and Windsor has been long delayed in the tense run-up to the continental trade deal review.What many policymakers in Washington fail to realize is that

The post The Defense Industrial Alliance Washington Is Throwing Away appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Rally as Dip Buyers Lift Tech, Mideast Fighting Eases
top_signals.summary: Bargain hunters emerged to pick up beaten-down technology stocks on Monday, helping US stocks rally from last week’s declines.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump Signals Diplomatic Opening After Days of U.S.-Iran Strikes
top_signals.summary: After some persistent Sunday reports, including in The Wall Street Journal, said that last week's renewed tit-for-tat fighting between the US and Iran in the Strait of Hormuz had 'stalled' the next round of talks, President Trump stated on Truth Social Monday that a meeting on Iran would be held in Doha on Tuesday. He stipulated that Iran has requested the talks. "Iran has requested a meeting. It will take place tomorrow in Doha," Trump wrote on his social media platform in all caps. NBC notes in the immediate aftermath of the statement, "There…

top_signals.title: Army wants up to 100 drone boats to fill watercraft gap in Pacific
top_signals.summary: As the Army contends with a shortage of boats in the Pacific, it's looking at autonomous watercraft to fill the gaps.
